alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a dithioacetal functional group with the general structure R2C(SR')2.
alternative_parents.name: Dithioacetals

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing the thiohemiaminal group with the general structure R1SC(R2)(R3)N(R4)R5 (R1-R5=H, alkyl, aryl).
alternative_parents.name: Thiohemiaminal derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organosulfur compounds containing a thioether group that is substituted by two alkyl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Dialkylthioethers

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a dialkylamine group, characterized by two alkyl groups bonded to the amino nitrogen.
alternative_parents.name: Dialkylamines

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a bond between carbon a pnictogen atom. Pnictogens are p-block element atoms that are in the group 15 of the periodic table.
alternative_parents.name: Organopnictogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Organic compounds containing an heterocycle with at least one nitrogen atom and one carbon atom linked to each other.
class.name: Azacyclic compounds

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as 1,3,5-dithiazinanes. These are cyclic compounds that contain a dithiazinane ring, which is a saturated heterocycle that consisting of one nitrogen atom, two sulfur atoms at the 1-,3-, and 5- position, respectively.

direct_parent.description: Cyclic compounds that contain a dithiazinane ring, which is a saturated heterocycle that consisting of one nitrogen atom, two sulfur atoms at the 1-,3-, and 5- position, respectively.
direct_parent.name: 1,3,5-dithiazinanes

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Cyclic compounds that contain a dithiazinane ring, which is a saturated heterocycle that consisting of one nitrogen atom, two sulfur atoms, and 2 carbon atoms.
subclass.name: Dithiazinanes

superclass.description: Compounds containing a ring with least one carbon atom and one non-carbon atom.
superclass.name: Organoheterocyclic compounds
